---
title : "Comparison of MMSE and MAP"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate(".."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random, LinearAlgebra, SpecialFunctions
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
"""
    spike_slab_density(y, σ; α=0.95)

Spike-and-slab prior density convolved with Gaussian noise of variance σ².
The slab component is scaled by τ = √(1/(1-α)) to give the slab unit variance.
"""
function spike_slab_density(y, σ; α = 0.95)
    τ = sqrt(1 / (1 - α))
    norm = 1 / sqrt(2π)
    spike(y) = α / σ * exp(-y^2 / (2σ^2))
    slab(y)  = (1 - α) / sqrt(σ^2 + τ^2) * exp(-y^2 / (2(σ^2 + τ^2)))
    norm .* (spike.(y) .+ slab.(y))
end

"""
    laplace_density(y, σ; λ=sqrt(2))

Laplace prior density (with parameter λ) convolved with Gaussian noise of variance σ².
λ = √2 gives the Laplace prior unit variance.
"""
function laplace_density(y, σ; λ = sqrt(2))
    a = λ^2 * σ^2 / 2
    b = λ * σ

    return @. λ/4 * (
        exp(a - λ*y) * (1 - erf((b - y/σ)/sqrt(2))) +
        exp(a + λ*y) * (1 - erf((b + y/σ)/sqrt(2)))
    )
end

"""
    compute_mmse(y, σ, density_fn; kwargs...)

Compute the MMSE (posterior mean) estimator via the identity:
    E[x|y] = y + σ² · d/dy log p(y)
using finite differences on the log-density.
Returns estimates on the grid y[2:end].
"""
function compute_mmse(y, σ, density_fn; kwargs...)
    py = density_fn(y, σ; kwargs...)
    Δy = y[2] - y[1]
    return y[2:end] .+ σ^2 .* (log.(py[2:end]) .- log.(py[1:end-1])) ./ Δy
end

"""
    compute_laplace_map(y, σ; λ=sqrt(2))

Compute the MAP estimator for a Laplace prior with parameter λ
under Gaussian noise of variance σ² (soft-thresholding).
"""
compute_laplace_map(y, σ; λ=sqrt(2)) = sign.(y) .* max.(abs.(y) .- λ * σ^2, 0)

y     = -5:0.015:5
y_mid = y[2:end]   # MMSE/MAP are evaluated on the shifted grid

sigmas       = [1/8, 1/2, 1, 2]
sigma_labels = ["1/8", "1/2", "1", "2"]
colors       = [blue, orange, green, pink]

# Pre-compute all estimators
ss_mmse  = [compute_mmse(y, σ, spike_slab_density) for σ in sigmas]
lap_mmse = [compute_mmse(y, σ, laplace_density)    for σ in sigmas]
lap_map  = [compute_laplace_map(collect(y_mid), σ) for σ in sigmas]

fig = Figure(size=(1000, 333))

function add_lines!(ax, estimates, cols, labs)
    for (est, col, lab) in zip(estimates, cols, labs)
        lines!(ax, collect(y_mid), est; linewidth=2, color=col, label=lab)
    end
    axislegend(ax; position=:lt)
end

ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1];
    title="Spike and Slab — MMSE",
    xlabel="y", ylabel="MMSE(y)",
    xticks=-5:5:5,
    yticks=-5:5:5,
)
add_lines!(ax1, ss_mmse, colors, sigma_labels)

ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2];
    title="Laplace — MMSE",
    xlabel="y", ylabel="MMSE(y)",
    xticks=-5:5:5,
    yticks=-5:5:5,

)
add_lines!(ax2, lap_mmse, colors, sigma_labels)

ax3 = Axis(fig[1, 3];
    title="Laplace — MAP",
    xlabel="y", ylabel="MAP(y)",
    xticks=-5:5:5,
    yticks=-5:5:5,
)
add_lines!(ax3, lap_map, colors, sigma_labels)

fig
```
